name: Taxation of Souls
description: Adventurers lose 5% of their current HP each time they enter a new room.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers are already weakened on kill — you gain slightly less Gold per death.

name: Bloodbound
description: Your minions deal +50% damage but die permanently instead of respawning overnight.
tradeoffDescription: Every minion lost is gone forever. Your dungeon slowly hollows out if you're not careful.

name: Gold Rush
description: Adventurers drop double gold when they die.
tradeoffDescription: One extra adventurer enters the dungeon each day. More prey, more risk.

name: Undying Horde
description: When a minion dies, 40% chance it rises as a weaker undead — half HP, fights until truly destroyed.
tradeoffDescription: Undead minions cannot evolve and die permanently if killed again. Your strongest minions become shambling echoes.

name: Sealed Paths
description: Fleeing adventurers have a 50% chance to get turned around and rerouted deeper into the dungeon.
tradeoffDescription: Cornered adventurers fight with desperate fury — they deal 25% more damage when below their flee threshold.

name: Pack Synergy
description: Minions deal +15% damage per other allied minion in the same room, up to +60%.
tradeoffDescription: Solo minions gain no bonus. Your dungeon rewards dense packing — spread coverage gets weaker.

name: The Hasty Architect
description: During the Night Phase, you receive a 50% discount on traps.
tradeoffDescription: All traps have a 25% chance to fail or jam when triggered.

name: Pact of the Great Erasure
description: Adventurers retain zero knowledge of the dungeon when they escape — every party that returns starts blind.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers arrive with 2× base Health, Damage, and Speed.

name: Schism
description: Adventurer parties splinter on entry — every adventurer paths solo, with no party loyalty, no healing, no shared buffs.
tradeoffDescription: Solo adventurers never flee. They fight to the death.

name: Glory Hounds
description: Adventurers refuse to retreat — they fight on no matter how wounded they are.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers below 30% HP deal +50% damage.

name: Sworn Rivals
description: Two adventurers in each party are bound as sworn rivals. When both fall below half HP, they break formation and attack each other on sight.
tradeoffDescription: While both rivals are at full HP, each one deals +25% damage.

name: Famine Decree
description: Adventurers at less than half HP deal −50% damage. Wound them and they wither.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers at full HP deal +50% damage. Fresh-faced parties hit like trucks.

name: Gilded Demise
description: Adventurers drop +50% gold when they die.
tradeoffDescription: Every 50 gold earned today raises tomorrow's adventurer count by 1.

name: Pyramid Scheme
description: The first kill each day grants 5× gold.
tradeoffDescription: Every subsequent kill that day grants only 50% of normal gold.

name: Ransom Note
description: Every adventurer who escapes the dungeon pays you a 5g ransom.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers move 25% faster — harder to catch before they bolt.

name: Tax the Living
description: Every adventurer entering the dungeon pays you a 3g toll.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers arrive at +20% HP — they paid extra to be tougher.

name: Tower Tax
description: Every ranged adventurer's first attack of the day misses entirely.
tradeoffDescription: Every attack after that first miss deals +30% damage.

name: Crusader's Curse
description: Healer classes (Cleric, Bard) cannot heal in your dungeon.
tradeoffDescription: Healer adventurers arrive with +50% HP to compensate.

name: Kennel Discipline
description: All your minions move 50% faster.
tradeoffDescription: Minions cannot patrol — they stand still in their assigned room until something walks in.

name: Ironhide Rite
description: Your minions take 50% less damage from melee attackers.
tradeoffDescription: Minions take 100% more damage from ranged attackers.

name: Frenzy Pact
description: When an ally minion dies in a room, every surviving minion in that room gains +25% damage for the day. Stacks. No cap.
tradeoffDescription: Each stack also gives those minions −25% defense. Also no cap.

name: Last Stand Doctrine
description: Minions deal +100% damage when they are the last surviving ally in their room.
tradeoffDescription: Minions who triggered Last Stand return at 50% HP the next day, drained from the effort.

name: Mage Hunt
description: Your minions deal +50% damage against ranged adventurer classes.
tradeoffDescription: Minions deal −25% damage against melee classes. Knights and Barbarians are now your hardest matchup.

name: Vampire's Toll
description: Every adventurer killed in your dungeon heals the boss for 5% of max HP.
tradeoffDescription: Every adventurer who escapes alive damages the boss for 5% of max HP.

name: Tyrant's Gaze
description: Each time the boss lands a hit during a boss fight, every minion in the boss chamber gains +1 attack for the rest of the day (stacks).
tradeoffDescription: Each time the boss takes a hit during the fight, every minion in the boss chamber loses 1 HP.

name: Soul Tether
description: When a minion dies in the boss chamber, the boss heals for 10% of max HP.
tradeoffDescription: When a minion dies anywhere else in the dungeon, the boss takes 5% max HP damage.

name: Avenger's Rite
description: Whenever a minion dies, the boss enrages: +25% damage for 10 seconds during boss fights.
tradeoffDescription: When an adventurer first enters the boss chamber, the boss is dazed for 5 seconds (no attacks).

name: Final Breath
description: Once per run, when the boss is about to die in a boss fight, instead revive at 50% HP and full-heal every minion in the dungeon.
tradeoffDescription: After the revive triggers, the boss permanently deals −25% damage for the rest of the run.

name: False Maps
description: Adventurer intel of your dungeon is scrambled — every room they think they know is labelled wrong.
tradeoffDescription: When an adventurer enters a room and realizes the intel was wrong, they enrage: +50% damage for 30 seconds.

name: Whispered Lies
description: Adventurer trap intel is poisoned with extra fake trap markers pointing at empty floor tiles.
tradeoffDescription: Real traps still work — but adventurers waste pathfinding effort routing around bait tiles, sometimes routing into your real ones.

name: Open Book
description: Your traps deal 2× damage and your minions take 50% less damage. They knew, they came anyway.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers see every trap and minion in your dungeon from the moment they spawn.

name: Whisperer's Tongue
description: Your minions can hear adventurers up to 5 tiles away and engage them through walls.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers know the location of every minion you've placed.

name: Doomsday Clock
description: Gain 500 gold immediately.
tradeoffDescription: On the 7th day from now, a guaranteed raid arrives — the wave is doubled in size.

name: The Long Game
description: Every 3 days, you receive a free random rare pact at dawn.
tradeoffDescription: Every 3 days, you also lose one random minion permanently AND your maximum minion slots drop by 1.

name: Inquisitor's Mark
description: Each day, one adventurer is marked. Killing the marked one grants 5× gold.
tradeoffDescription: The marked adventurer arrives with 2× HP and +50% damage.

name: Summon Adds I
description: At the start of each day, 2 random Tier-1 minions appear in the boss chamber. They guard the room and despawn at day's end.
tradeoffDescription: When a summoned add dies, the boss loses 5% of max HP.

name: Summon Adds II
description: At the start of each day, 2 random Tier-2 minions appear in the boss chamber. They guard the room and despawn at day's end.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers entering the boss chamber deal +25% damage.

name: Summon Adds III
description: At the start of each day, 1 random Tier-3 minion (the strongest forms) appears in the boss chamber.
tradeoffDescription: Every day for the rest of the run, +1 adventurer enters the dungeon.

name: Drill Sergeant
description: +5 maximum minion slots regardless of Barracks count.
tradeoffDescription: All minions cost 50% more gold to place.

name: Endless Garrison
description: Each Barracks grants 15 minion slots instead of 10.
tradeoffDescription: All minions deal 15% less damage — they're overcrowded.

name: The Cull
description: +10 maximum minion slots flat.
tradeoffDescription: At the end of each day, your weakest alive minion is permanently culled.

name: Trap Mason's Touch
description: +5 maximum trap slots regardless of Trap Factory count.
tradeoffDescription: All traps cost 50% more gold to place.

name: Trapsmith's Guild
description: Each Trap Factory grants 10 trap slots instead of 5.
tradeoffDescription: All traps deal 25% less damage — quantity over quality.

name: Forbidden Workshop
description: +10 maximum trap slots flat.
tradeoffDescription: Each dawn, 25% of your placed traps are randomly disabled for that day.

name: Architect's Vision
description: +3 maximum minion slots and +3 maximum trap slots.
tradeoffDescription: +1 adventurer enters the dungeon each day.

name: Hellfire Breath
description: Boss gains a cone fire-breath attack during boss fights — every 8 seconds, AoE damage to up to 3 adventurers in front.
tradeoffDescription: The breath has a 3-second windup; the boss does not attack while charging it.

name: Lightning Strike
description: Boss can summon a lightning bolt at the highest-damage adventurer every 6 seconds during boss fights. Big single-target damage.
tradeoffDescription: Each cast costs the boss 3% of max HP.

name: Shockwave Slam
description: Every 10 seconds during boss fights, the boss slams the ground — AoE damage to all adventurers in the boss chamber.
tradeoffDescription: The boss is stunned for 2 seconds after each slam.

name: Spectral Reach
description: Every 5 seconds during boss fights, the boss teleports adjacent to the closest adventurer and instantly strikes.
tradeoffDescription: The boss attacks 25% more slowly all day.

name: Dark Vortex
description: Every 12 seconds during boss fights, the boss pulls all adventurers in the boss chamber 2 tiles toward itself.
tradeoffDescription: The vortex also pulls your minions in the boss chamber, disrupting their positions.

name: Soul Drain
description: Every 12 seconds during boss fights, the boss channels a beam at one adventurer for 3 seconds, dealing damage and healing the boss for half that amount.
tradeoffDescription: The boss can't move or block while channeling.

name: Doppelgangers
description: Every 5 seconds during boss fights, the boss conjures 3 illusory copies for 4 seconds.
tradeoffDescription: The real boss only deals 50% damage during the illusion window.

name: Petrifying Stare
description: Every 15 seconds during boss fights, the boss freezes one random adventurer in the chamber for 5 seconds.
tradeoffDescription: There's a 25% chance per cast that the stare backfires and stuns the boss for 3 seconds instead.

name: Cursed Soil
description: Adventurer kills inside rooms grant +50% gold.
tradeoffDescription: Empty floor tiles in your dungeon deal 1 damage per second to anyone standing on them, including your minions.

name: Sundered Floor
description: Each day, a random floor tile becomes a pitfall — telegraphed for 5 seconds, then anyone standing on it takes 25% max HP damage and is briefly stunned. The tile turns pitch black after triggering.
tradeoffDescription: There's a 5% chance the pitfall opens under one of your minions instead.

name: Pact of the Mirror
description: At each dawn, one of your minions is duplicated — a free copy at half HP appears beside it.
tradeoffDescription: When either twin dies, both die.

name: Pact of the Cartographer
description: At day start, the planned path of every adventurer is revealed to you in advance.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers move 25% faster.

name: Pact of the Jester
description: All trap costs are reduced by 75% and traps deal +50% damage.
tradeoffDescription: Trap names are scrambled in your build menu — you don't know which trap you're placing until after it's down.

name: Pact of the Whisperer
description: One adventurer per day is marked — they panic-flee on sight of any of your minions.
tradeoffDescription: The marked adventurer's party gains +50% damage out of revenge.

name: Pact of the Brand
description: Each night you choose one trap to 'bless' — its next firing deals 5× damage.
tradeoffDescription: After firing, the blessed trap is destroyed.

name: Pact of the Reaper
description: When an adventurer dies in a room, the next adventurer to enter that room is cursed: −25% HP and −25% damage.
tradeoffDescription: The cursed adventurer's curse is visible to their party — they sometimes skip the room entirely.

name: Pact of the Crucible
description: Once per run, you may sacrifice one minion to instantly evolve another in the same room to the next tier.
tradeoffDescription: The sacrificed minion's level is lost; the evolved minion keeps its current XP.

name: Pact of the Marionette
description: Once per day, left-click any of your minions during the day phase to possess it. WASD moves the puppet; it auto-attacks adventurers in melee range.
tradeoffDescription: While possessed, every other minion in the dungeon stands idle. You lose possession if the puppet is killed or the day ends.

name: Blood Money
description: Each adventurer killed permanently adds +1 gold per night. The bodies pile up, the gold flows.
tradeoffDescription: Every 5th kill permanently boosts all future adventurers by +2% HP. The dungeon's legend grows.

name: The Leech
description: On sealing: gain 800 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: You lose 8% of your current gold every dawn — for the rest of the run.

name: Pact of the Last Heart
description: On sealing: claim a free Legendary pact of fate's choosing.
tradeoffDescription: Your boss is reduced to a single heart — one lost boss fight ends the run, and you can never regain a heart.

name: Famished Dark
description: On sealing: gain 1500 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurer kills grant 50% less gold — for the rest of the run.

name: The Open Gate
description: On sealing: gain 1500 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: +10 adventurers enter the dungeon every day — permanently.

name: Hollow Crown
description: On sealing: claim a free Legendary pact of fate's choosing.
tradeoffDescription: Your boss's maximum HP is permanently cut in half.

name: The Bleeding Crown
description: On sealing: gain 1200 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: The boss loses 2% of its maximum HP, permanently, every day.

name: Sleepless Throne
description: On sealing: gain +10 maximum minion slots.
tradeoffDescription: The boss begins every boss fight at only 50% HP.

name: Tribute of Flesh
description: On sealing: gain 700 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Every adventurer who escapes alive loots 20 gold from your treasury.

name: Cursed Blood
description: On sealing: gain 1000 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Every minion that dies anywhere damages the boss for 3% of its max HP.

name: The Hollow Horde
description: On sealing: every current minion gains +20% to all stats.
tradeoffDescription: Your maximum minion slots are halved for the rest of the run.

name: Brittle Bones
description: On sealing: all current minions deal +25% damage.
tradeoffDescription: Any minion struck while below 50% HP shatters instantly.

name: The Wasting
description: On sealing: all current minions evolve one tier (where possible).
tradeoffDescription: At the end of each day, every surviving minion permanently loses 5% of its max HP.

name: The Hunger
description: On sealing: gain 1000 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Each dawn, 20% of your minions die permanently — no revival.

name: The Unteachable
description: On sealing: gain 1000 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Your minions can no longer gain XP or evolve for the rest of the run.

name: The Martyr's Curse
description: On sealing: gain 800 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: When a minion dies, nearby adventurers heal 25% of their max HP.

name: Mounting Debt
description: On sealing: gain 1000 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Every day, the gold cost of all rooms, minions and traps rises 5% — compounding.

name: The Sealed Vault
description: On sealing: gain 1500 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: You can never sell anything — rooms, minions or traps — again.

name: Brittle Engines
description: On sealing: all traps deal +100% damage.
tradeoffDescription: Every trap breaks permanently after firing once.

name: Trapless Halls
description: On sealing: existing traps deal +50% damage, and gain 600 gold.
tradeoffDescription: You can place no new traps for the rest of the run.

name: Famine's Grip
description: On sealing: gain 800 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Treasure rooms and items pay 50% less gold.

name: Pact of Glass
description: On sealing: every minion is free to place during the next build phase.
tradeoffDescription: All your minions' maximum HP is permanently halved.

name: The Insomniac
description: On sealing: gain 600 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Every third night the dungeon is sealed — nothing may be placed, sold, or moved.

name: Crumbling Halls
description: On sealing: gain 600 gold and +3 trap slots.
tradeoffDescription: At the start of every night a random room — never the Boss Chamber or an Entry Hall — is destroyed with everything in it.

name: Blind Architect
description: On sealing: gain 400 gold at once.
tradeoffDescription: Your minimap and adventurer-intel panel are disabled for the rest of the run.

name: Colossus Heart
description: Your boss's maximum HP is doubled.
tradeoffDescription: The boss attacks 50% slower — a mountain that strikes like one.

name: The Apex Tyrant
description: Your boss gains +100% maximum HP and +50% attack and defense.
tradeoffDescription: Your power draws champions — every adventurer wave is doubled for the rest of the run.

name: Avatar of Ruin
description: Your boss is invincible for the first 5 seconds of every boss fight.
tradeoffDescription: The boss's maximum HP is cut in half — a brief god, then glass.

name: Wrath Unbound
description: The boss gains up to +100% attack as its HP falls — most savage at death's door.
tradeoffDescription: The boss takes +50% more damage.

name: Crown of Avarice
description: All gold income is doubled.
tradeoffDescription: Every 5th day a guaranteed hero-grade raid arrives — double the wave, +50% adventurer stats.

name: The Iron Price
description: Your minions and traps deal double damage.
tradeoffDescription: You can no longer earn gold — no kills, no treasure, nothing. Fight with what you have.

name: Sudden Death
description: Your minions, traps and boss deal 5× damage — every fight is instant.
tradeoffDescription: So do the adventurers. Everyone is glass; a single hit can end anything.

name: The Undying Court
description: Every adventurer who dies in your dungeon rises the next night as an undead minion of its own class, keeping its kit — forever.
tradeoffDescription: Each occupies 2 minion slots and makes living adventurers stronger; with no free slots, 2 of your minions are sacrificed to make room.
